bonus_components.label: Prime Time Bonus
bonus_components.explanation: +8 pts for peak AM (07:30-10:00), +6 for midday (11:00-12:00), +7 for peak PM (18:00-19:30) slots.

bonus_components.label: Volume Reliability
bonus_components.explanation: Up to +5 pts for stronger historical volume.

bonus_components.label: Fill Rate Absolute Bonus
bonus_components.explanation: +6 pts if avg fill >= 60%, +3 if >= 45%.

score_breakdown.formula: Default class score = avg_attendance_norm*75 + avg_fill_rate*15 + revenue_norm*7 + sessions_norm*3 + prime_bonus + volume_bonus + fill_abs_bonus. PowerCycle and Strength use their separate fill-first formulas.

components.label: Average Attendance
components.explanation: Primary scoring signal for non-PowerCycle/non-Strength classes; uses grouped-class average attendance within the studio.

components.label: Capacity Fill Rate
components.explanation: Primary scoring signal for PowerCycle and Strength; secondary signal for other classes.

components.label: Revenue Generated
components.explanation: Revenue per session normalized against other slots in the same studio.

components.label: Number of Sessions
components.explanation: Lowest-weight confidence/history component.

score_breakdown.formula: Default class score = avg_attendance_norm*75 + avg_fill_rate*15 + revenue_norm*7 + sessions_norm*3 + prime_bonus + volume_bonus + fill_abs_bonus. PowerCycle and Strength use their separate fill-first formulas.

bonus_components.label: Fill Rate Absolute Bonus
bonus_components.explanation: +6 pts if avg fill >= 60%, +3 if >= 45%.

score_breakdown.formula: Default class score = avg_attendance_norm*75 + avg_fill_rate*15 + revenue_norm*7 + sessions_norm*3 + prime_bonus + volume_bonus + fill_abs_bonus. PowerCycle and Strength use their separate fill-first formulas.
